title: After shipped back to open in kanban

phases.name: Extend tikiStateStore with history data
phases.description: Add recentIssues array to tikiStateStore to track completed issues for the Kanban completed column
tasks: Add CompletedIssue interface with number, title, completedAt
Add recentIssues state to TikiStateState interface
Add setRecentIssues action to update the list
phases.verification: tikiStateStore.ts exports recentIssues state and setRecentIssues action

phases.name: Update App.tsx to sync history data
phases.description: Modify state loading to also sync history.recentIssues to tikiStateStore
tasks: Update TikiState interface to include full recentIssues array
Call setRecentIssues when state changes (file watcher event)
phases.verification: App.tsx syncs recentIssues to store on state load and change

phases.name: Update KanbanBoard to show completed issues from history
phases.description: Modify the Completed column logic to use recentIssues (limited to 8) instead of relying on GitHub state
tasks: In columns memo, populate Completed column with first 8 items from recentIssues
Create synthetic GitHubIssue objects from recentIssues for display
Ensure completed issues don't appear in other columns
phases.verification: Completed column shows last 8 completed issues from history

phases.name: Build and verify
phases.description: Run typecheck and build to ensure no errors
phases.verification: Build succeeds with no type errors
